hypothesis: Combining Bollinger Bands (strength), RSI (momentum), and ATR (volatility) filters with a basic breakout strategy can enhance trade entries in the 30m timeframe for crypto pair 2ZUSDC, while robustly managing risk. This approach helps filter out market noise by using ATR to set stop loss/take profit distances.

The combination of RSI, Bollinger Bands and ATR provides a robust trading strategy as they all serve different purposes in the market and can help us to identify various aspects like trend, momentum, volatility etc. The ATR based risk management with stop loss below 1.5 times ATR below entry & take profit at 3 times ATR above entry ensures that we limit our losses while providing enough room for profits.
